A '''skirmish''' at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Helska IV]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] marked the beginning of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Arriving at the Helska system, unaware of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] presence, [[Kyp Durron]] and his [[Kyp's Dozen|Dozen-and-Two Avengers]] headed into the [[Battle of Helska IV|Battle of Helska]].

==Prelude==
Leaving [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] mining operation in a asteroid field, Durron and his Avengers checked on a buoy set up to monitor local traffic and help in catching smugglers. On the holo, Durron noticed a [[Spacecaster-class shuttle|''Spacecaster''-class shuttle]] heading for the Helska system, and decided to investigate.<ref name="Vector Prime" />

==The battle==
Arriving at the Helska system, they found Helska-4, a barren ice world. Unbeknownst to the Avengers, a [[Koros-Strohna|Yuuzhan Vong worldship]] had landed on the planet and set up a sizable base. When they ventured closer to the planet, they encountered small, asteroid-like objects grouping near them. Without warning, the asteroids opened fire on the Avengers, who realized that the objects were not asteroids at all, but a kind of starfighter analog. The Avengers fought off the enemy starfighters (later dubbed [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]]), and were faring well until the Yuuzhan Vong began using [[dovin basal]]s to strip the Avengers' fighters of their shields. Without their shields, the Avengers were quickly decimated. Remaining fighters tried to escape but they were attacked by [[Grutchin]]s. [[Miko Reglia]] crashed onto Helska and died not long after, and Durron and an unknown [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] pilot made blind jumps into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], though the latter's craft likely exploded from its overpowered engines before it could activate the hyperdrive. Kyp Durron was the only survivor of the battle.<ref name="Vector Prime" />
